title: Princess of the Realm
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Long may she reign!|The [[Priamsta]], acclaiming [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo|Plourr Ilo]] as '''Empress Apparent-Heir''' of [[Eiattu 6]]|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess]]''</ref>}}
'''Princess of the Realm''' and '''Empress Apparent-Heir''' were two titles borne by [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]] of [[Eiattu 6]] after she was called home to take up the reins of government on her homeworld in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] Apparent-Heir's father was [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Uthorrferrell Cartha]], and she referred to herself as "the [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] of the Realm" to [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Rial Pernon]]. Princess Isplourrdacartha had a younger brother, Prince [[Harrandatha Estillo|Harran]]. Plourr was addressed as "Her Highness" and "Princess" when Eiattu joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
